subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-05-30
subcodes.first_line: I am the interpreter of the Writings of the Blessed Beauty, as explicitly designated by the Supreme Pen.
subcodes.first_line_orig: من مبین آیات جمال مبارکم و منصوص قلم اعلی کل باید اطاعت نمایند جمیع امور
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @House of Justice
